g.text: USB-C power · AMS1117 3.3 V LDO · CH340C USB-UART with auto-program · ESP32-WROOM-32E · THVD1410 RS-485 DMX out
DTR/RTS from CH340C toggle EN & IO0 through SS8050 NPNs — no buttons needed to upload.
D1 power (always on) · D2 status (sunrise blink)
EN pull-up R5, cap C6, buttons SW1 (EN) / SW2 (BOOT)
Local bypass caps from +3V3 to GND across the board (C1/C2 shown at the LDO).
Matching net names (rounded tags or pin labels) are the same electrical net.
Transmit-only RS-485: RO unconnected, DE+/RE tied (firmware holds enable HIGH). 120R termination DNP — the PL60C terminates the bus.
Power: USB-C 5 V → AMS1117 → +3V3. Also on board: 4× M3 mounting holes (H1–H4).
